sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince parametric optimal f method: size positions by iteratively testing f values against historical P&L distribution mapped to standard deviation levels, weighted by probability. Optimal f determined through search that maximizes geometric mean HPR across the empirical distribution. Requires minimum 232 historical trades.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is determined by calculating optimal f through parametric analysis of historical trade P&L distributions using standard deviation values and their associated probabilities to generate HPR (Holding Period Return) multipliers.
